title: Cross-tenant leak fix in multi-site PubSub
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/tenant_orders_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TenantOrdersLive) that subscribes to "orders:org:#{org_id}" (NOT "orders") gated by connected?/1. The handle_event("create") call broadcasts on the same scoped topic. Additionally, handle_info({:new_order, order}, socket) must pattern-match against order.org_id == socket.assigns.current_org.id as a defensive check, so that even if a broadcast leaks, the UI ignores it. mount assigns :current_org from session. stream(:orders, []).
tier_rationale: Scoped topic + defensive consumer check. Two layers of tenant isolation.
